item.name: Fylgja Horn
item.description: When blown, this lovingly wrought horn emits a lyrical sound that summons Fylgja to your side.

mount.name: Fylgja
mount.action: Summon forth Fylgja, a dragon with a soft spot for heroes and songs.
mount.description: Like her noble forebear Ratatoskr, Fylgja is passing fond of mankind, and traveled the world in search of mortals worthy of immortalizing in song. During the course of her journeys, she would encounter a soul who shone most brilliantly in battle. So moved was she by the hero's selfless valor, she chose to become <If(PlayerParameter(4))>her<Else/>his</If> follower.
mount.tooltip:
Would you look at that─
my dulcet voice has drawn
yet another devoted follower!
- Ulala
